additional_steps.name: OneUI 优化检测
additional_steps.sql:
SELECT
  s.name as optimization_event,
  s.dur / 1e6 as dur_ms,
  (s.ts - (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})) / 1e6 as relative_ts_ms
FROM slice s
WHERE (s.name GLOB '*OneUI*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*SEC*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*Samsung*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*GameOptimizer*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*GameBooster*')
  AND s.ts >= (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
  AND s.ts <= (SELECT ts + dur FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
ORDER BY s.ts ASC

additional_steps.name: Game Booster 检测
additional_steps.sql:
SELECT
  s.name as booster_event,
  s.dur / 1e6 as dur_ms
FROM slice s
WHERE (s.name GLOB '*GameBooster*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*game*booster*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*GOS*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*GameOptimizingService*')
  AND s.ts >= (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
  AND s.ts <= (SELECT ts + dur FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
ORDER BY s.dur DESC

additional_steps.name: 三星服务检测
additional_steps.sql:
SELECT
  s.name as service_event,
  s.dur / 1e6 as dur_ms,
  t.name as thread_name
FROM slice s
JOIN thread_track tt ON s.track_id = tt.id
JOIN thread t ON tt.utid = t.utid
JOIN process p ON t.upid = p.upid
WHERE p.name GLOB '${package}*'
  AND (s.name GLOB '*SamsungPay*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*Knox*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*Bixby*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*SmartManager*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*DeviceHealth*')
  AND s.ts >= (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
  AND s.ts <= (SELECT ts + dur FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
  AND s.dur > 1000000
ORDER BY s.dur DESC

additional_steps.name: 自适应刷新率
additional_steps.sql:
SELECT
  s.name as refresh_event,
  s.dur / 1e6 as dur_ms
FROM slice s
WHERE (s.name GLOB '*AdaptiveRefresh*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*adaptive*refresh*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*VRR*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*RefreshRate*')
  AND s.ts >= (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
  AND s.ts <= (SELECT ts + dur FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
ORDER BY s.ts ASC

meta.description: 针对三星 OneUI 优化的启动分析
